summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: Global markets continue volatility, Friday's bearish close persists. Focus remains on geopolitical risks and AI sector correction. Utility/Energy sectors remain strong. KOSPI fluctuating around 2650pts.
summary.art: Cautious optimism for Q1 2026. Global art market resilience noted with 4% growth, sustained interest in high-end established artists and institutional acquisitions.
